message:
test(time-parser,bd-7qtn5): metamorphic + property-style coverage for parse_time_input

Bead coding_agent_session_search-7qtn5 (child of ibuuh.10, scenario
/testing-metamorphic on a surface not yet covered).

The existing file had exactly one test — the bead-vmtms overflow
regression — which pinned "i64::MAX relative-time inputs don't panic"
but nothing about the broader public contract
src/ui/time_parser.rs::parse_time_input documents.

Added 7 new tests under one umbrella: adversarial-input coverage +
metamorphic invariants. Scope chosen because the function is called
from every `--since` / `--until` / `--days` filter path and any panic
or silent-mis-multiplication escapes directly to user-visible robot-
mode error handling.

New tests:
  1. parse_time_input_is_total_for_adversarial_inputs
     Feeds 25 adversarial strings (empty, pure whitespace, partial
     unit strings, unknown units, zero/negative-zero, 25-digit
     numerics past i64::MAX, embedded null, fullwidth digits, emoji,
     unicode minus, 10k-char repeats) and asserts NO panic. Any
     future refactor that introduces a .unwrap() or similar on the
     input-parse path fires this test.
  2. parse_time_input_empty_and_whitespace_returns_none
     Specifically pins the early-return None path at the top of the
     function.
  3. parse_time_input_trims_leading_and_trailing_whitespace
     Metamorphic: parse_time_input("  now  ") ≈ parse_time_input("now")
     within 1s wall-clock-drift tolerance. Also covers "today",
     "yesterday", "7d", "-3h".
  4. parse_time_input_keywords_are_case_insensitive
     Metamorphic: NOW/Now/nOw/nOW ≈ now. Same for today / yesterday.
     The function lowercases input, but only the keyword match
     branch relies on the lowercase invariant — a refactor that
     moved the lowercase step past the keyword match would break
     case-insensitivity silently, caught here.
  5. parse_time_input_negative_durations_are_monotonic
     Property: for N1 < N2, parse_time_input("N1d") > parse_time_input("N2d").
     Going further back in time must produce earlier timestamps.
     Catches unit-multiplier sign bugs.
  6. parse_time_input_equivalent_unit_spellings_agree
     Cross-branch consistency: "7d" ≈ "7 days ago" ≈ "7d ago";
     "24h" ≈ "1d" ≈ "24 hours ago"; "2w" ≈ "14d". The three parse
     paths (prefix-hyphen, "N ago", bare "Nunit") are independent
     branches — this test pins their semantic agreement.
  7. parse_time_input_numeric_heuristic_cutoff_holds
     Boundary-probe the seconds-vs-ms heuristic at 10^11. Below →
     ×1000; at/above → pass-through. Catches a refactor that
     changes the cutoff and silently misinterprets operator filter
     values.

Verified locally:
  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch_target_cass_p3 \
  rch exec -- cargo test --test regression_coding_agent_session_search_vmtms
  -> 8 passed in 0.00s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
